method_summary: DrDiff introduces three core technologies: dynamic expert scheduling for intelligent resource allocation, Hierarchical Sparse Attention reducing complexity from O(n²) to O(n), and soft absorption guidance optimization with DPM-solver++ to reduce diffusion steps.
key_innovation: Hierarchical Sparse Attention (HSA) mechanism that adaptively adjusts attention patterns according to input lengths while maintaining model performance.
title: DrDiff: Dynamic Routing Diffusion with Hierarchical Attention for Breaking the Efficiency-Quality Trade-off
